title: TZ-5 CI validators
objective:
Create file .github/workflows/governance-validation-ci.yml with content name: governance-validation-ci
'on':
  workflow_dispatch:
permissions:
  contents: read
jobs:
  validate-foundation:
    name: Validate governance foundation
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - name: Checkout
        uses: actions/checkout@v4
      - name: Setup Python
        uses: actions/setup-python@v5
        with:
          python-version: '3.11'
      - name: Validate readiness levels
        run: python governance/validators/validate_readiness_levels.py
      - name: Validate pass sources
        run: python governance/validators/validate_pass_sources.py
      - name: Validate BEM-1284 minimal loop
        run: python governance/runners/minimal_governance_loop_runner.py
Append to governance/AGENT_CONTEXT.md:
